items.title: DoorDash is turning stablecoins into its core labor infrastructure across 40+ countries
items.summary: DoorDash is working with Stripe-backed Tempo to bring stablecoin-powered payouts into its marketplace. items.title: The world’s central banks are now treating stablecoins like a real multi-trillion dollar monetary threat
items.summary: The world's central banks stopped arguing about whether stablecoins are risky long ago. Their main concern now is about who will control them and how. items.title: Ethereum Foundation unstakes 17K ETH after nearing 70K staked ETH milestone
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation unstaked over 17,000 ETH worth $40M shortly after approaching its 70,000 ETH staking target.
items.whyItMatters: Infrastructure changes here can reset risk and throughput expectations.
